chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1704 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.02.2016 For Katcha Peshi Mr. Ali Zaman Khan Patoli, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti, Advocate for respondent Nos. 2 and 3 a/w Deputy Manager SSGC Legal Services Department, Hyderabad. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, Standing Counsel-II. Petitioners are inhabitants of village Meenho Khan Bhand and are requesting for facility of Sui Gas Connection. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti, Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondent Nos.2 and 3 along with comments. He states that the entire village Meenho Khan Bhand where the petitioners are residing has been gasified but since the petitioners in their individual capacity have not moved any application for gas connection to their respective houses, it could not be provided to them. He further states that, if any application is submitted by the petitioners in this regard that would be duly processed and gas connections will be provided to them within a period of one month. This has satisfied the counsel for petitioners who seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. Accordingly this petition is disposed of in view of the statement of the counsel of respondent Nos. 2 and 3. JUDGE JUDGE *Karar/-
